scripts.ci: npm run test:repo && npm run test:boundaries && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.publish:npm: npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-contract --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org && npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-core --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org && npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-feature --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.publish:github: npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-contract --access public --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com && npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-core --access public --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com && npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-feature --access public --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
scripts.publish:github:canary: npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-contract --tag canary --access public --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com && npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-core --tag canary --access public --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com && npm publish --workspace=packages/autograph-feature --tag canary --access public --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
